ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the aircraft used in the flight */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the flight in minutes */,
  "no_pasg" INTEGER /* Number of passengers on board */,
  "speed_ground" REAL /* Ground speed of the aircraft */,
  "speed_air" REAL /* Air speed of the aircraft */,
  "height" REAL /* Altitude of the aircraft */,
  "pitch" REAL /* Pitch angle of the aircraft */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance traveled during the flight */,
  "departure_airport" TEXT /* The airport from which the flight departs */,
  "arrival_airport" TEXT /* The airport where the flight arrives */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* The time the flight departs */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* The time the flight arrives */,
  "fuel_consumed" REAL /* The amount of fuel consumed during the flight */,
  "fuel_efficiency" REAL /* The fuel efficiency of the flight (e.g., km/l) */,
  "flight_status" TEXT /* The status of the flight (e.g., on time, delayed, canceled) */,
  "flight_route" TEXT /* The route taken by the flight (e.g., JFK-LAX) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircrafts ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircrafts" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the aircraft */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft */,
  "year_made" INTEGER /* Year the aircraft was manufactured */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of passengers */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* The unique registration number of the aircraft */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* The date of the last maintenance */,
  "total_flying_hours" REAL /* The total number of flying hours of the aircraft */,
  "current_fuel_capacity" REAL /* The current fuel capacity of the aircraft */,
  "last_fuel_refill" TEXT /* The date and time of the last fuel refill */,
  "service_status" TEXT /* The current service status of the aircraft (e.g., in service, maintenance, grounded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight the passenger is on */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the passenger */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number of the passenger */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* The passport number of the passenger */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* The contact number of the passenger */,
  "email" TEXT /* The email address of the passenger */,
  "frequent_flyer_number" TEXT /* The frequent flyer number of the passenger */,
  "boarding_time" TEXT /* The time the passenger boarded the flight */,
  "deboarding_time" TEXT /* The time the passenger deboarded the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight the metric is associated with */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "metric_timestamp" TEXT /* The timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* The type of metric (e.g., engine, navigation, fuel) */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* The source of the metric (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  "metric_status" TEXT /* The status of the metric (e.g., normal, warning, critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight log entry */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight the log entry is associated with */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* The location of the event (e.g., latitude, longitude) */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* The type of event (e.g., takeoff, landing, in-flight) */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* The status of the event (e.g., completed, in progress, delayed) */,
  "event_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the event in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_logs_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the aircraft the record is for */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "completed_by" TEXT /* Name of the technician who completed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* The type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* The status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, in progress, pending) */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* The date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* The cost of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircrafts ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_attendants" (
  "attendant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight attendant */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight the attendant is on */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the flight attendant */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the flight attendant */,
  "attendant_type" TEXT /* The type of attendant (e.g., lead, senior, junior) */,
  "attendant_status" TEXT /* The status of the attendant (e.g., on duty, off duty) */,
  "attendant_certificate" TEXT /* The certificate number or type of the attendant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_attendants_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pilots" (
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pilot */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight the pilot is flying */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the pilot */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the pilot */,
  "pilot_status" TEXT /* The status of the pilot (e.g., on duty, off duty) */,
  "pilot_certificate" TEXT /* The certificate number or type of the pilot */,
  "pilot_experience" INTEGER /* The total years of flying experience of the pilot */,
  "pilot_last_training" TEXT /* The date of the pilot's last training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pilot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pilots_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the aircraft the prediction is for */,
  "predicted_issue" TEXT /* Predicted issue with the aircraft */,
  "predicted_date" TEXT /* Predicted date for the issue */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "prediction_source" TEXT /* The source of the prediction (e.g., sensor data, manual input) */,
  "prediction_status" TEXT /* The status of the prediction (e.g., pending, confirmed, resolved) */,
  "predicted_maintenance_cost" REAL /* The estimated cost of the predicted maintenance */,
  "predicted_maintenance_type" TEXT /* The type of maintenance predicted (e.g., engine, hydraulic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircrafts ("aircraft_id")
)
